default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define and test new lead generation and client service workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Lead Enrichment Workflow:** A new workflow uses Clay to enrich post engagers, costing \~$20/post. This is viable for \~5 clients on the current plan and will be tested on Growrk to demonstrate value before their contract ends.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Automated Outreach Strategy:** To scale lead generation, the team will automate sourcing and message drafting for personalized LinkedIn outreach. This hybrid approach mitigates AI risk by requiring manual review before sending from Eduardo's profile.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4681.0)
  - [**Future Analytics Platform:** The team will explore building a custom analytics platform using the LinkedIn API and OpenClaw. This would replace Shield, integrate analytics into the core product, and reduce costs.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Ads & Landing Pages

  - [**Ad Sponsorship:** All sponsored posts run via the client's company page, not their personal profile.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [**Requirement:** The individual whose content is being sponsored must be an admin on the company page.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [**Landing Page Tracking:** The team's tracking system is confirmed to be working, as test URLs (e.g., `/y-combinator`) are appearing in the RB2B dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [**Client Requirement:** Clients must duplicate their landing pages to enable A/B testing and accurate attribution for ad campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**Future Service Idea:** Offer to rewrite client landing page copy to improve conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
      - [**Pricing Models Discussed:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
          - [Fixed fee (e.g., $2k)](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
          - [Performance-based fee (e.g., $5k, paid only if demo bookings increase)](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Decision:** Defer this until the core ad workflow is fully defined and automated.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Lead Enrichment Workflow

  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
    1.  [**Export:** Manually export post engagement CSVs from Shield.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
    2.  [**Run:** Use a Cloud Code script to process the CSV, scrape profiles, and enrich leads via Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
    3.  [**Review:** Manually review the AI-generated lead list for accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
  - [**Cost Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [**Clay Credits:** \~$20 per post (based on qualified leads).](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
      - [**Scraping:** \~$1–$3 per 1,000 scrapes.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [**Total:** Viable for \~5 clients on the current plan.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [**Immediate Test:** The workflow will be run for Growrk to demonstrate value before their contract ends next month.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [**Strategic Application:** The process can be used to scrape engagers from competitor posts (e.g., Project 33) to generate new leads.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)

### Automated LinkedIn Outreach Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build a consistent lead generation engine beyond BotDog.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=2598.0)
  - [**Proposed Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4681.0)
    1.  [**Source Leads:** Use Apollo to build targeted lists (e.g., Series A founders).](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
    2.  [**Filter & Scrape:** Use the enrichment process to filter for active posters (e.g., \>2k followers, recent activity).](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=3602.0)
    3.  [**Draft Messages:** Use AI to draft personalized messages based on a lead's recent posts.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4504.0)
    4.  [**Manual Review:** A human reviews and edits each message to ensure quality and prevent reputational risk.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4657.0)
    5.  [**Send:** Manually send messages from Eduardo's profile to leverage his network and avoid LinkedIn account risk.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=3171.0)
  - [**Lead Magnet:** Offer a free, personalized LinkedIn strategy audit to drive responses.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4108.0)

### Future: Custom Analytics Platform

  - [**Problem:** Shield's pricing model (free for 1 week of data, then $200/month/client) is not scalable.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Solution:** Explore building a custom analytics platform using the LinkedIn API and OpenClaw.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This would integrate analytics directly into the rhetoric platform, reduce costs, and improve the client experience.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Feasibility:** Eduardo's experience building a similar API connection with OpenClaw and Fathom suggests this is achievable.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carlos:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [Run the lead enrichment workflow for Growrk.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
      - [Test scraping engagers from a Project 33 post.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)
      - [Inform Luca to connect his LinkedIn account to Shield.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Andre:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4461.0)
      - [Assist Carlos with lead sourcing for the new outreach strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4461.0)
  - [**Eduardo:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4215.0)
      - [Explore using OpenClaw to automate sourcing of newly funded startups.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4215.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4681.0)
      - [Define the full workflow for the new automated outreach strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/[REDACTED:TOKEN]?tab=summary&timestamp=4681.0)
